definition: present, appearing, or found everywhere
example: Smartphones have become ubiquitous in modern society.
ielts_tip_uz: Band 7+ essays uchun juda foydali so'z. 'Common' o'rniga ishlating!

definition: tending to cause harm or damage
example: Excessive screen time can be detrimental to children's development.
ielts_tip_uz: 'Bad' yoki 'harmful' o'rniga 'detrimental' ishlating ‚ÄĒ bu akademik yozuvda juda yuqori baholanadi.

definition: to make a problem, situation, or negative feeling worse
example: Air pollution can exacerbate respiratory diseases in urban areas.
ielts_tip_uz: 'Make worse' o'rniga ishlating. Ayniqsa muammo haqida yozayotganda juda kuchli so'z.

definition: more important than anything else; supreme
example: Education is of paramount importance for the development of any nation.
ielts_tip_uz: 'Very important' o'rniga 'of paramount importance' deb yozing ‚ÄĒ bu band 7+ ifoda.

definition: to make something less severe, serious, or painful
example: Governments must take action to mitigate the effects of climate change.
ielts_tip_uz: Yechim taklif qilayotganda ishlating: 'To mitigate this problem, governments should...'

definition: rapid increase in the number or amount of something
example: The proliferation of social media platforms has transformed communication.
ielts_tip_uz: 'Increase' o'rniga 'proliferation' ishlating ‚ÄĒ akademik darajani oshiradi.

definition: never done or known before
example: The pandemic caused unprecedented disruption to global education systems.
ielts_tip_uz: Yangi hodisa yoki o'zgarish haqida gapirganda ishlating. Writing Task 2 da juda kuchli.

definition: making a certain situation or outcome likely or possible
example: A quiet environment is conducive to effective learning.
ielts_tip_uz: 'Good for' o'rniga 'conducive to' ishlating. Masalan: 'conducive to learning'.

definition: inborn; natural rather than learned
example: Some researchers argue that language ability is innate rather than acquired.
ielts_tip_uz: Nature vs Nurture mavzusida juda foydali. 'Natural' o'rniga ishlang.

definition: having a great deal of money; wealthy
example: Affluent nations have a responsibility to assist developing countries.
ielts_tip_uz: 'Rich' o'rniga 'affluent' ishlating. 'Affluent societies' ‚ÄĒ juda keng ishlatiladigan IELTS iborasi.

definition: dealing with things sensibly and realistically
example: A pragmatic approach to education reform would focus on teacher training first.
ielts_tip_uz: Yechim taklif qilganda: 'A pragmatic solution would be...' ‚ÄĒ bu band 8 darajadagi ifoda.

definition: a great difference between things
example: There is a growing disparity between the rich and the poor in many countries.
ielts_tip_uz: 'Difference' o'rniga 'disparity' ishlating. Ijtimoiy mavzularda juda mos keladi.

definition: to examine or inspect closely and thoroughly
example: Government policies should be scrutinized to ensure they benefit all citizens.
ielts_tip_uz: 'Look at carefully' o'rniga ishlating. Akademik yozuvda kuchli fe'l.

definition: able to be maintained at a certain rate or level without depleting resources
example: Sustainable development requires balancing economic growth with environmental protection.
ielts_tip_uz: Atrof-muhit mavzusida eng ko'p ishlatiladigan so'z. 'Sustainable development' iborasini yodlang.

definition: to become progressively worse
example: Air quality continues to deteriorate in major cities due to industrial emissions.
ielts_tip_uz: 'Get worse' o'rniga 'deteriorate' ishlating. Grafik tavsiflashda ham foydali.

definition: seeming reasonable or probable
example: The theory that social media affects mental health is entirely plausible.
ielts_tip_uz: Fikr bildirganingizda: 'It is plausible that...' ‚ÄĒ bu band 8 daraja ifodasi.

definition: to surround and have or hold within; to include comprehensively
example: A good education should encompass both academic knowledge and practical skills.
ielts_tip_uz: 'Include' o'rniga 'encompass' ishlating ‚ÄĒ bu kengroq ma'noni beradi.

definition: to make something continue indefinitely
example: Stereotypes in the media can perpetuate harmful social attitudes.
ielts_tip_uz: Ijtimoiy muammolar haqida: 'This trend perpetuates inequality' ‚ÄĒ juda kuchli ifoda.

definition: absolutely necessary or essential
example: Technology has become indispensable in modern healthcare.
ielts_tip_uz: 'Very necessary' o'rniga 'indispensable' ishlating. Speaking Part 3 da ham qo'llash mumkin.

definition: strict, precise, and exacting
example: Stringent regulations are needed to reduce carbon emissions.
ielts_tip_uz: 'Strict' o'rniga 'stringent' ishlating. Qonun va qoidalar haqida yozganda juda mos.

definition: liable to change rapidly and unpredictably
example: The economic situation remains volatile due to global uncertainties.
ielts_tip_uz: Iqtisodiyot mavzusida: 'volatile market', 'volatile prices' ‚ÄĒ band 7+ iboralar.

definition: to make suffering, a problem, or a deficiency less severe
example: The government introduced new policies to alleviate poverty in rural areas.
ielts_tip_uz: 'Reduce' o'rniga ishlating: 'alleviate poverty', 'alleviate suffering' ‚ÄĒ band 7+ so'z.

definition: forming a united whole; well-integrated
example: A cohesive community is better equipped to face challenges together.
ielts_tip_uz: IELTS yozuvda 'cohesion' ‚ÄĒ baholash mezonlaridan biri. 'Cohesive essay' ‚ÄĒ yaxshi bog'langan esse.

definition: to provide someone with an incentive for doing something
example: Tax breaks can incentivize companies to adopt environmentally friendly practices.
ielts_tip_uz: Yechim taklif qilganda: 'Governments should incentivize...' ‚ÄĒ juda akademik ifoda.

definition: very great or intense; having deep meaning
example: Technology has had a profound impact on the way people communicate.
ielts_tip_uz: 'Big' yoki 'great' o'rniga 'profound' ishlating: 'a profound effect/impact'.

definition: to reduce in extent or quantity; impose a restriction on
example: The new law aims to curtail the use of single-use plastics.
ielts_tip_uz: 'Reduce' yoki 'limit' o'rniga ishlating ‚ÄĒ akademik yozuvda juda yuqori baholanadi.

definition: clear and definite; real; perceptible by touch
example: There has been no tangible improvement in air quality despite government efforts.
ielts_tip_uz: 'Clear' yoki 'real' o'rniga: 'tangible results', 'tangible benefits' ‚ÄĒ band 8 so'z.

definition: corresponding in size or degree; in proportion
example: Salaries should be commensurate with the level of experience and qualifications.
ielts_tip_uz: Ish haqi va ta'lim mavzusida: 'commensurate with' ‚ÄĒ band 8+ ifoda.

definition: without intention; accidentally
example: Social media platforms can inadvertently spread misinformation.
ielts_tip_uz: 'By accident' o'rniga 'inadvertently' ishlating ‚ÄĒ bu band 8 daraja so'z.

definition: capable of working successfully; feasible
example: Renewable energy is a viable alternative to fossil fuels.
ielts_tip_uz: 'Possible' o'rniga 'viable' ishlating: 'a viable solution/option/alternative'.

definition: growing or expanding rapidly
example: The burgeoning population of cities is putting pressure on infrastructure.
ielts_tip_uz: 'Growing fast' o'rniga 'burgeoning' ishlating. Urbanizatsiya mavzusida juda mos.

definition: an unintended consequence of an event or action
example: Deforestation can have severe repercussions for biodiversity.
ielts_tip_uz: 'Result' yoki 'effect' o'rniga 'repercussion' ishlating ‚ÄĒ ayniqsa salbiy oqibatlar uchun.

definition: to place close together for contrasting effect
example: The essay juxtaposes traditional and modern teaching methods effectively.
ielts_tip_uz: Ikki narsani solishtirganda: 'When we juxtapose X with Y...' ‚ÄĒ band 8+ ifoda.

meaning_uz: keng tarqalgan, hamma joyga kirib borgan
definition: spreading widely throughout an area or group of people
example: The pervasive influence of advertising shapes consumer behaviour significantly.
ielts_tip_uz: 'Ubiquitous' ga o'xshash, lekin ko'proq salbiy ma'noda ishlatiladi. 'Pervasive problem'.

definition: the ability to produce a desired or intended result
example: The efficacy of online education is still a subject of debate.
ielts_tip_uz: 'Effectiveness' o'rniga 'efficacy' ishlating ‚ÄĒ bu akademik matnlarda ko'p uchraydi.
